summary: Comprehensive testing of Agent Configuration Manager (ACM) with bug fixes and new Chat Wizard feature completed successfully. All three key fixes verified: 1) Save button navigation guard bypass working via bypassBlock() function, 2) Keep All toggle logic correctly shows 'Keep N Turns' vs 'Keep All' based on keep_turns presence, 3) Chat Wizard feature fully functional with step-by-step guided creation, YAML preview, and Save/Copy/Download options. Backend maintains 100% API functionality. All existing features (navigation guard, clone, version history, compare) working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend API maintains 100% functionality (10/10 tests passed)
Agent List loads with 16 seeded agents correctly displayed
Chat Wizard accessible at /wizard with guided conversational interface
Chat Wizard progresses through all steps with proper explanations
Chat Wizard choice buttons work for agent type, provider, model selection
Chat Wizard multi-select builtin tools feature working
Chat Wizard generates YAML preview with Save/Copy/Download buttons
Save button bypass fix: New agents save successfully without navigation guard blocking
Keep All toggle fix: Customer Support Agent shows 'Keep N Turns' with value 5
Keep All toggle fix: E2 Coding Assistant shows 'Keep All' (toggle ON)
Navigation guard still works: Unsaved changes trigger confirmation dialog
Navigation guard dialog shows 'Keep editing' and 'Discard changes' options
Clone functionality works: Creates copy with '_copy' suffix
Version History works: Shows versions with View/Restore options
Agent editor tabs all functional (General, Model, Toolsets, etc.)
Model tab Keep All toggle displays correct state based on configuration
Wizard navigation shows step progress (5/14, 14/15, etc.)
All core CRUD operations for agents working via API
Search and filter functionality on agent list working
